backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the event planning platform backend with user profiles, events, organizers, bookings, and reviews. Includes authorization mixins, persistent storage maps, and public functions for CRUD operations on all entities with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features for displaying complete event details in OrganizerBookingCard and GuestBookingList components with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components, pages, and hooks describing the FIESTA event planning application's UI structure, routing, authentication, and data management.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes defining colors for background, foreground, primary, secondary, borders, and component-specific styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the FIESTA application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for landing, guest, organizer, and admin pages, wrapped in a Layout component with Header, Footer, and conditional ProfileSetupModal.
frontend/src/components/admin/AnalyticsC: Reusable card component displaying analytics metrics with icon, label, value, and optional description with hover effects.
frontend/src/components/admin/AnalyticsD: Admin dashboard component displaying analytics cards for total organizers, total events, most popular event type, and highest rated organizer using data from backend queries.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Authentication button component handling Internet Identity login/logout with query cache clearing on logout, displaying appropriate icons and text based on authentication state.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup collecting full name and email with validation, preventing dismissal until profile is completed.
frontend/src/components/booking/BookingR: Modal dialog for guests to create booking requests by selecting one of their events and submitting it to a specific organizer, with success feedback and navigation to bookings page.
frontend/src/components/booking/GuestBoo: Displays a list of booking cards for guests, showing booking status, organizer details, and associated event information fetched dynamically for each booking.
frontend/src/components/booking/Organize: Card component for organizers to view booking requests with event details and action buttons to approve or reject pending bookings.
Organizes and displays booking requests in two sections: pending requests and past bookings, using OrganizerBookingCard for each item.
frontend/src/components/events/CreateEve: Form component for guests to create events with fields for event type, date, location, guest count, style, and contact number, with validation preventing past dates.
frontend/src/components/events/EventList: Displays a list of event cards showing event details including type, date, location, guest count, style, and contact information.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Footer component displaying copyright information and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Main navigation header component with logo, desktop/mobile menus, and conditional links for authenticated users (events, organizers, bookings, dashboard). Includes responsive mobile menu toggle and LoginButton integration.
frontend/src/components/organizer/Organi: Card component displaying organizer profile details (company name, contact, experience, pricing, rating, availability) with optional selection checkbox and booking modal trigger. Includes portfolio image preview with fallback to static assets or sessionStorage cache.
Table component for comparing multiple organizers side-by-side with sortable columns (rating, experience, pricing) and booking action buttons. Opens BookingRequestModal for selected organizer.

Form component for creating/editing organizer profiles with fields for company name, contact, experience, pricing, description, and availability status. Validates input and uses useSaveOrganizerProfile mutation with toast notifications.

Read-only view component displaying organizer profile information in a card layout with contact details, experience, pricing, reviews, and availability badge. Includes embedded PortfolioGallery component.
frontend/src/components/organizer/Portfo: Gallery component displaying organizer portfolio images in a responsive grid with lightbox modal for full-size viewing and navigation controls. Handles image loading from sessionStorage cache or static assets with error fallback.
React component for organizers to upload, preview, and delete portfolio images with file validation (5MB max, JPG/PNG/WebP), progress tracking, and integration with backend mutations and queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, initializes access control with admin token, and invalidates dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Custom React hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend actor using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralized collection of React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, events, organizers, bookings, reviews, availability, and portfolio images with mutations and queries.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom navy/gold theme colors, light/dark mode support, typography settings using Inter and Playfair Display fonts, and utility classes for shadows and color variants.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function that combines clsx and tailwind-merge to conditionally merge Tailwind CSS class names.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only dashboard page that checks user role and authentication, redirecting non-admin users, and displays the AnalyticsDashboard component.
frontend/src/pages/GuestBookings.tsx: Guest bookings page that displays a list of the authenticated user's bookings, redirecting to home if not logged in.
Guest event management page with a two-column layout showing a form to create new events and a list of the user's existing events.
frontend/src/pages/GuestOrganizerBrowsin: Guest page for browsing all organizers with selection capability and navigation to comparison view. Redirects to home if not authenticated.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Marketing landing page with hero section, feature cards, and CTA. Redirects authenticated users to guest events dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerBookingManag: Organizer-facing page to view and manage incoming booking requests. Requires authentication and displays OrganizerBookingList component.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerComparison.t: Displays side-by-side comparison table of selected organizers based on IDs passed via URL search params. Requires authentication.
frontend/src/pages/OrganizerDashboard.ts: Main dashboard for organizers to create/edit profile, manage portfolio uploads, and navigate to booking requests. Toggles between view and edit modes.
frontend/src/ui/button.tsx: Reusable Button component using Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for variant styling (default, destructive, outline, ghost, link) and sizes.
frontend/src/ui/card.tsx: Set of composable Card components (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter, CardAction) for consistent layout styling.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both standard query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including navy/gold colors, custom shadows, font families (Inter, Playfair Display), accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking a fix request for event details not displaying in booking requests, with two existing features for displaying event details in OrganizerBookingCard and GuestBookingList components.
